overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban environment. The player traverses covered pedestrian arcades, crosses intersections with futuristic vehicle traffic, and passes by the Night City Police Department while encountering various NPCs and dense cyberpunk city elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping arcade with vending carts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade, passing vending carts and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench near the vending cart

entered.detail: overhead concrete and metal structure covering the pedestrian walkway
blue mobile cart with glowing neon signage displaying food items
large vertical holographic advertisement with pink neon lighting
green corrugated metal security shutter on closed shop front
black garbage bags piled next to concrete barrier

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian arcade at night, illuminated by vibrant neon signs and holographic advertisements. The player walks forward past a food vending cart and closed shop fronts with metal shutters, while sparse pedestrians occupy benches along the right side. The overhead structure creates a sheltered, semi-enclosed atmosphere with artificial neon lighting dominating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with digital tower signage

events.description: exits covered arcade into open intersection with view of LC 10 tower
futuristic vehicles pass through intersection while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, navigating between passing vehicles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: tall building with large illuminated LC 10 signage in vertical white letters
building facade with NIGHT CITY POLICE DEPARTMENT text signage
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
sleek black vehicle with glowing accents driving through intersection

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered arcade into a wide-open urban intersection dominated by the glowing LC 10 tower sign. Crossing the white-striped crosswalk, futuristic vehicles pass by on the right while the Night City Police Department building becomes visible ahead. The environment shifts from sheltered to exposed, with neon lighting continuing to illuminate the scene from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: police department plaza with gathering areas

events.description: enters the Night City Police Department plaza with benches and gathering NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking through the police plaza, passing groups of NPCs gathered near benches and walls

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs standing and conversing near the building wall

entered.detail: large blue and white building with NIGHT CITY POLICE DEPARTMENT signage and modern architecture
concrete seating areas with NPCs sitting and resting
green and yellow automated vendor with glowing display
concrete wall with colorful spray paint and murals

segments.scene_description: The player enters the plaza in front of the Night City Police Department, a large modern building with distinctive blue paneling. Groups of NPCs gather on benches and near graffiti-covered walls while the player navigates through the semi-covered space. The area features mixed lighting from overhead structures and surrounding neon signs, creating a sheltered urban environment with moderate pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and vending

events.description: crossing street at yellow striped crosswalk with traffic light
enters commercial sidewalk with Mark 24 store and Burrito XXL vending machine

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk and continuing along the commercial sidewalk past pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink shirt and white shorts walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: illuminated store sign with MARK 24 text above entrance
green and red automated food vendor with BURRITO XXL branding and IT'S BIG text
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow parallel stripes
building signage with SALSA STUDIOS text in illuminated letters

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a wide intersection marked by bold yellow crosswalk stripes, with the SALSA STUDIOS building visible across the street. Upon reaching the opposite sidewalk, the player passes the Mark 24 storefront and a Burrito XXL vending machine while navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic. The scene maintains the vibrant neon aesthetic with various illuminated signs and advertisements lining the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban district, moving from a sheltered pedestrian arcade into wide-open city intersections. It begins within a covered walkway illuminated by holographic advertisements and vibrant signs, passing closed shop fronts and vending carts under a semi-enclosed ceiling. As the camera emerges from the arcade, the environment opens into a vast intersection dominated by the glowing LC 10 tower, where the player crosses a white-striped crosswalk amidst futuristic vehicle traffic. The scene then shifts toward the plaza of the Night City Police Department, navigating through groups of NPCs and blue-paneled architecture before crossing another wide intersection marked by bold yellow stripes. Finally, the movement concludes on a bustling sidewalk past the SALSA STUDIOS building and a Burrito XXL machine, surrounded by the dense, illuminated signage of the city street.
